creator: kristinacors
caption: You’re Not Using Google AI The Right Way For Travel… Save This Before Your Next Trip! #travelhacks #nychiddengems #thingstodoinnyc #Aitravelhacks #travelplanning

transcription.text: I love finding incredible hidden gems in New York City, but I hate the logistics. That's why my biggest travel hack for planning a trip and exploring New York City is Google AI. Today I'm visiting three hidden gems in New York City, and here are three ways AI and Google search made my life way easier. The first stop was Botanical Garden 6BC, and it was so cool when I opened the Google app, pointed the camera at this plant, and tapped the Google lens camera icon. It told me all the info about this plant, like its name, where it grew, and I honestly could have stayed for hours doing this. Second stop, Museum at Eldridge Street. It's a museum showcasing immigrant history and stunning architecture. Once I was there, I opened the Google app, pointed my camera at the text inside, tapped the lens camera icon, then tapped the translate option at the bottom to see on-screen translations. Third stop, lunch. Google AI actually helped me find this spot. All I had to do was open the Google app, click on AI mode, and then type, help me find a lunch spot for two this Friday in the Lower East Side, looking for a place with sidewalk seating, natural wine, and all-day breakfast. That's how I found Dudley's, and literally with two clicks, booked a resi. So save this video so you don't forget these tips, and follow for more travel hacks.
